description:
Extend YamlWorkflowFile with new fields: phases (BTreeMap), agents (BTreeMap, reuse AgentProfile directly), tools_allowlist (Vec).

Update parse_yaml_workflow_config():
- Convert yaml_file.phases via yaml_phase_to_execution_definition()
- Auto-register command/manual phase IDs in phase_catalog with title-cased labels
- Pass through agents and tools_allowlist

Update merge_yaml_into_config():
- Merge phase_definitions (overlay overwrites)
- Merge agent_profiles (overlay overwrites)
- Merge tools_allowlist (union, dedup)

Update validate_workflow_config():
- Validate phase_definitions mode/command/manual consistency
- Validate command programs in tools_allowlist

Update validate_workflow_and_runtime_configs():
- Accept phases in workflow.phase_definitions (not just runtime)
title: Update YamlWorkflowFile and parse/merge/validate for phases, agents, tools_allowlist
